notes: Sizing tokens (Option D from the v1.6.34 sizing-architecture discovery) — pure no-op refactor; ZERO visual change. Introduces a :root tap-target token scale --tap-xl/--tap-l/--tap-m/--tap-s = 56/52/48/44px (byte-identical to the four dominant min-height values that previously appeared 81 times across the file: 56px×14, 52px×22, 48px×11, 44px×34 — 76% of all min-height declarations). Every one of those 81 declarations is now routed through the corresponding token via 8 mechanical replace_all edits (4 sizes × with-space and without-space spacing variants). Computed values are identical pre- and post-refactor; rendered pixels match v1.6.32 exactly on every surface (bottom nav, NOW tiles, MASTER tab, modal buttons, action stripe, BUILD/SCAN/KNOW chrome). NO value changes, NO JS touched, NO onclick targets changed, NO functional surface touched (phantom_parseMaster, PHANTOM_MASTER_STORE, MASTER tab logic, EDP/BOM, deploy_*, Ghost Echo, PIN gating, boot-restore IIFE — all byte-identical). The Apple HIG accessibility floor is 44px and gloved-hand realistic minimum is ~50px — a future glove-ergonomics tune is now a one-line edit per token instead of touching ~80 rules. Note: v1.6.33 was skipped (allocated to a max-width revert plan that did not ship); v1.6.34 ships directly from v1.6.32. SW cache bumped together.
